headline: Citi Names New Head of Strategy as Jane Fraser Steers Bank Into ‘Next Phase’
summary: Citigroup  has named a new executive to oversee firmwide strategy and is combining two top roles as the bank looks to complete its yearslong transformation.  Citi  CEO Jane Fraser and Gonzalo Luchetti, the firm’s new chief financial officer, wrote in a memo to employees on Wednesday that Fraser’s chief of staff, Margo Pilic, would be the next head of strategy, mergers and acquisitions, and investor relations.

headline: Citi Foundation Launches $20 Million Request for Proposals to Support Nonprofit Housing Developers Across the U.S.
summary: NEW YORK, June 03, 2026--The Citi Foundation ("the Foundation") today launched a $20 million Request for Proposals (RFP) focused on helping address operational and financial barriers to building and preserving affordable housing across the United States. Through this 2026 Housing Supply RFP, part of Citi’s Blueprint for Housing Opportunity initiative, 20 nonprofit housing developers will each receive $1 million to help scale the supply of affordable homes in the communities that need them most.
